this game was made to be very good and fun. I like the update launches every time. It just gets better and better and better. I swear that this game just had to be good when it was made and I loved it ever since till today and I decided to make a review about it so people could see my review and how they react to what I say about this very fun game. I hope y’all make some very more beautiful updates to your games that you have and keep going. Don’t stop do what you’re your future tells you to do follow your passion so you keep making good games just like this game.

Me and my friends have alot of fun playing this game! The monsters look cool, the animations look cool too, The cosmetics, everything. Try this game, alone, with friends, etc. Sadly, the game got filled with modders, but, you can download an apk for an old version of the game with no modders!

If you've seen my comment before, you would probably know that I gave it a lower rating because I wasn't able to rejoin. However, all you have to do is click a server button, pretty sure I'm why it says it above the servers. Besides that, amazing game! It's pretty underrated imo, and the new parking lot is massive. Definitely recommend if you're bored.
